templates.name: Premium Brand Pop-Up
templates.blurb: Multi-day branded experience with bar build, talent, and full-service execution.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will execute end-to-end activation services for this premium brand pop-up. Our crew will handle pre-event sourcing of all branded POSM, signage, and props; coordinate inbound delivery and warehouse staging at our Las Vegas facility; provide white-glove transportation to venue; lead on-site installation and bar build; and manage all on-site execution including talent supervision, drink service flow, inventory tracking, and brand-standard adherence.

The activation includes a full installation crew for load-in, lead bartenders and bar-backs for service hours, brand ambassadors as scoped, on-site project management, and complete strike with materials returned to HANDS warehouse for client retrieval or storage. All vehicles, equipment, and consumables are HANDS-provided unless otherwise noted in line items.

HANDS provides $2M general liability coverage, certified bartenders with active TAM cards, and full chain-of-custody on all branded materials. Final headcounts and crew sizing locked 7 days prior to load-in.

templates.name: Single-Night Activation
templates.blurb: One-night brand event — install, execute, strike same-day or overnight.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will execute a single-night brand activation including pre-event coordination, day-of installation, live event execution, and overnight strike. Our scope covers load-in of all branded elements, bar build and beverage service setup, on-site talent management for the event window, and complete teardown with materials returned to HANDS warehouse.

Crew will arrive at the venue at the scheduled load-in time with all installation tools, transportation equipment, and branded materials already staged. During the event window, HANDS provides the lead bartender, bar-backs, and floor crew as scoped in line items. Strike begins at event end and continues until all branded elements are removed and the venue is restored to its pre-event condition.

Includes general liability coverage and TAM-certified service staff. Tipping is at client's discretion and not included in line-item pricing unless specified.

templates.name: Multi-Day Brand Experience
templates.blurb: 3-7 day activation with daily reset, ongoing inventory management, and rotating talent.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will operate this multi-day brand experience as the on-site execution partner from initial load-in through final strike. Scope includes all pre-event sourcing and warehouse staging, rigging and installation of branded environment, daily activation operation including bar service and brand ambassador deployment, end-of-night reset and re-stocking, ongoing inventory tracking, and final strike with full materials accounting.

Daily operations include morning prep and bar setup, scheduled service hours with full crew, end-of-day cleanup and inventory reconciliation, and security handoff to venue. HANDS provides crew rotation across days to maintain freshness and consistency. Mid-week deliveries from the warehouse are coordinated as needed for restocks and replenishment.

The scope includes a dedicated HANDS project manager on-site for the duration of the activation, daily client check-ins with photos and metrics, and a final post-event recap deck delivered within 5 business days of strike.

templates.name: Trade Show / Convention Booth
templates.blurb: Convention center booth build, staffing, and breakdown.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will manage the full lifecycle of this trade show booth including drayage coordination with the venue, on-site assembly of all booth elements, daily booth staffing during exhibit hours, mid-show restocking of collateral and giveaways, and final dismantle with materials shipped back to client or stored at HANDS warehouse.

Our scope includes navigating venue-specific union labor requirements where applicable, coordinating with the official show contractor for booth materials handling, ensuring booth is operational at exhibit open each day, and providing trained brand ambassadors who can speak to the brand's key messaging. Daily booth maintenance, signage upkeep, and inventory management of takeaways are all included.

Client is responsible for the booth design and brand assets; HANDS executes from approved specs. Any union labor surcharges from the venue are passed through at cost with documentation.

templates.name: VIP Private Event
templates.blurb: Discrete, high-touch service for a curated guest list. Premium bar program.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will execute this private VIP event with a discreet, hospitality-first approach. Our scope includes pre-event consultation on bar program and service flow, sourcing of premium glassware, ice program, and garnish prep, white-glove transportation of all materials to the venue, full bar build and service station setup, lead bartenders matched to the event's profile, and post-event strike with full materials reconciliation.

The activation prioritizes guest experience: bartenders work in muted black uniforms, materials are staged out of guest sightlines, and the strike process begins discretely as guest counts thin rather than after a hard event end. HANDS coordinates directly with the venue's catering team, guest services lead, and any third-party vendors to ensure seamless integration.

No branded elements unless explicitly specified in the line items — this scope assumes a clean, brand-neutral aesthetic appropriate to a VIP private setting. NDAs available on request.

templates.name: Logistics-Only (No On-Site Execution)
templates.blurb: Warehousing, transportation, and inbound/outbound coordination only.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will provide third-party logistics services for this activation without on-site execution. Scope includes inbound receipt of all client-shipped materials at our Las Vegas warehouse, secure short-term storage with full inventory tracking, scheduled outbound delivery to the activation venue at the agreed load-in window, post-event pickup from the venue, and return to warehouse for either re-staging, return shipping to client, or disposition per client direction.

All inbound shipments are photographed and documented on receipt; outbound deliveries include POD (proof of delivery) photos and a signed delivery confirmation. HANDS does not provide installation, talent, or on-site service under this scope — client or another vendor is responsible for those.

Warehouse storage is included for the duration of the activation engagement. Extended storage beyond strike date is billed at our standard rate. All transportation is performed in HANDS-branded vehicles with $2M general liability and full cargo coverage.

templates.name: Custom Build / Fabrication Only
templates.blurb: Bar build, signage fabrication, custom install elements — built and delivered.
templates.scope:
HANDS Logistics will fabricate the custom build elements specified in this proposal at our Las Vegas facility. Scope includes design refinement from client-provided specs, sourcing of all materials, fabrication and finishing, in-house QA and photo documentation, and delivery to the activation venue at the scheduled load-in time.

The scope does not include on-site installation, on-site service, or strike — those are billed separately if needed. Once the build is delivered and accepted at the venue, HANDS's responsibility for the build elements ends unless installation is also contracted.

All builds are delivered in HANDS-branded transport, fully assembled or in field-assembly modules per the spec. Materials and finishes are itemized in the line-item breakdown. Final design approval is required 14 days before the build's delivery date to maintain the schedule.

templates.name: Blank — Write Your Own
templates.blurb: Empty scope. Use the add-ons below to assemble custom language.

addons.name: Talent & Staffing
addons.blurb: Adds a paragraph on bartenders, brand ambassadors, and crew sourcing.
addons.text: Talent staffing for this activation is sourced through HANDS's vetted bench of Las Vegas bartenders, brand ambassadors, and event crew. All on-site personnel hold current TAM cards, are uniformed to the brand's specification, and are briefed on key messaging in a pre-event call. HANDS provides on-site lead supervision for any team larger than four; tipping policy is set in advance with the client and communicated to the team.

addons.name: Warehouse Staging
addons.blurb: Pre-event inventory receipt, staging, and quality control at HANDS facility.
addons.text: All branded materials, POSM, glassware, and bar inventory will be received at HANDS's Las Vegas warehouse a minimum of 5 business days before load-in. Inbound shipments are photographed, inventoried, and reconciled against the activation's master pull list. Any shortages, damages, or substitutions are flagged to the client immediately so resolution can happen before load-in rather than on-site. Materials are staged in their final configuration for transport, reducing on-site setup time.

addons.name: Post-Event Recap Deck
addons.blurb: HANDS delivers a branded recap deck within 5 business days of strike.
addons.text: Within 5 business days of activation strike, HANDS will deliver a custom recap deck covering: photo documentation from across the event window, key metrics (guest count, drinks served, install/strike hours, talent hours), a write-up of execution highlights and any noted client wins, and a debrief on any operational issues with HANDS's resolution. The deck is delivered as a hosted link at recap.handslogistics.com along with a downloadable PDF for client distribution.

addons.name: Rigging & Permits
addons.blurb: HANDS handles venue rigging coordination and any required municipal permits.
addons.text: HANDS will coordinate all venue-side rigging requirements including ceiling rigging, structural attachments, and fire marshal sign-off where applicable. Any required municipal permits, special-event licenses, or variance applications will be filed by HANDS at minimum 14 days before load-in. Permit fees and rigging surcharges from the venue or city are passed through at cost with documentation; HANDS does not mark up these third-party charges.

addons.name: AV / Production Coordination
addons.blurb: Lighting, sound, video — coordinated by HANDS as a third-party.
addons.text: HANDS will coordinate AV and production requirements through our preferred Las Vegas vendor network. Scope includes spec'ing the AV package against the activation needs, securing competitive bids, managing the production timeline, and supervising AV crew on-site. AV equipment, crew, and labor are billed as a pass-through line item at our negotiated rate; HANDS's coordination fee is included in the line-item breakdown.

addons.name: Weather Contingency (Outdoor)
addons.blurb: Backup plan for outdoor activations: tents, flooring, weather-monitoring.
addons.text: For outdoor activations, HANDS develops a weather contingency plan during the pre-event phase. The plan covers: weather monitoring beginning 7 days out, tent or canopy backup if rain or extreme sun is forecast, temporary flooring or pad placement for muddy conditions, and a hard go/no-go decision point with the client at T-24 hours. If the activation is canceled or rescheduled due to weather, HANDS's strike and re-set work is billed at our standard hourly rate.

addons.name: Ice & Glassware Program
addons.blurb: Premium ice (clear blocks, custom shapes), glassware sourcing & wash.
addons.text: HANDS sources and delivers a complete ice program for the activation including standard cocktail ice, large-format clear blocks for premium pours, and any custom-shape ice required by the cocktail menu. Glassware is sourced from our rental partners or supplied by the brand; HANDS handles wash-and-return logistics. Ice deliveries are timed to arrive 90 minutes before service to ensure peak quality at first pour.

addons.name: Branded Vehicle Wrap
addons.blurb: HANDS transport vehicles wrapped with brand graphics for the activation week.
addons.text: For the activation week, the HANDS vehicles delivering and supporting the event will be wrapped in client-branded graphics. Wrap design is approved by the client during the pre-event phase, fabrication is handled by HANDS's wrap partner, and the wraps remain on the vehicles for the duration of the activation. Wrap removal is included in the strike phase. Wrap fabrication, application, and removal are itemized as a line item in the proposal.

addons.name: NDAs & Confidentiality
addons.blurb: All HANDS personnel sign brand-specific NDAs; no social posts from staff.
addons.text: All HANDS personnel assigned to this activation will sign the brand's NDA during the pre-event briefing. HANDS staff are prohibited from posting any photos or video of the activation, the venue setup, talent appearances, or guest attendees on personal or professional social channels. Any photo or video documentation is delivered exclusively to the client as part of the post-event recap. This policy is enforced across our entire crew and is a condition of assignment.

addons.name: Tipping Policy Statement
addons.blurb: Clarifies whether tip jars are out, gratuities are included, etc.
addons.text: Tipping policy for this activation is set with the client in advance. Default policy: HANDS bartenders work without tip jars on the bar; any guest cash gratuities offered directly are accepted but not solicited; service staff hourly rates already include a service-charge premium reflecting that gratuities are not the expected income source. If the client prefers a different policy (tip jars displayed, full no-tip policy with signage, gratuity-included pricing), this is finalized during the pre-event call and reflected in the line items.
